title: Bangladesh battles measles outbreak
snippet: Bangladesh has reported over 1,000 suspected measles cases in 24 hours as infections surge, prompting emergency vaccinations to contain a deadly outbreak

title: Recent outbreaks highlight the risks of bacterial meningitis – and the need to vaccinate
snippet: Teens and young adults are more likely to be asymptomatic carriers of the bacterium that cause meningococcal disease, making university students a high-risk group.

title: Do you have the new Covid variant, flu or other virus? Look out for these symptoms
snippet: Flu and Covid, including a new variant called BA.3.2, nicknamed “cicada,” are still circulating across the U.S. in 2026. How do you know what's making you sick?

title: A high-risk bird flu strain is circling the globe. How prepared is NZ?
snippet: Bird flu is spreading globally and getting closer to New Zealand. Its arrival may be a matter of when, not if – and the risks are significant.

title: H9N2 Bird Flu Hits Europe as First Human Case Confirmed in Italy

title: First European case of H9N2 bird flu reported in Italy – what you need to know
snippet: A first human H9N2 bird flu case in Europe has been detected in Italy. A virologist explains why the current risk is low and what to watch next.

title: Grosso: ‘Sassuolo showed courage after a difficult week’ in virus outbreak
snippet: Fabio Grosso admits he ‘took a gamble and Sassuolo showed courage’ by fighting to a 1-1 draw away to Juventus, despite a week dominated by a whooping cough outbreak.

title: Highway shut down after waste truck carrying dead bird flu ducks crashes in northern Indiana
snippet: A hazmat situation unfolded in Churubusco, Indiana, after a truck carrying bird flu-infected dead ducks crashed into a ditch on U.S. Route 33, officials say.

title: Deadly virus outbreak at major park spreads across nearby beaches
snippet: The carnage began at Año Nuevo State Park, roughly 50 miles south of San Francisco, where a strain of H5N1 bird flu has decimated the local elephant seal population.

title: This flu-like illness you’ve never heard of is rising — what you need to know
snippet: Flu season might be winding down — but don’t stash the tissues just yet.
